<!----><!--2022-10-14 00:17:06-->
Intro ***E   C#m   E***  
  
    ***E                     C#m***  
She's got legs, she knows how to use them  
    ***E                   C#m***  
She never begs, she knows how to choose them  
    ***A                    B***  
She only lets  wonder how to feel them  
    ***A                    B***  
Would you get behind them if you could only find them  
    ***A              B***  
She's my baby, she's my baby  
   ***E*** *(slide)*  
Yeah, it's all right  
  
  
    ***E                     C#m***  
She's got hair down to her fanny  
    ***E                     C#m***  
She's got a dress slit right up to her panties  
    ***A                      B***  
Every time she's dancin' she knows what to do  
    ***A                      B***  
Everybody wants to see, see if she can use it  
    ***A               B***  
She's so fine, she's all mine  
   ***E*** *(slide)*  
Girl, you got it right  
  
  
  ***C#m  B*** *{2x}*  ***E*** *(slide)*  
  
  
   ***E                     C#m***  
She's got legs, she knows how to use them  
      ***E                  C#m***  
She never begs, she knows how to choose them  
      ***A               B***  
She's got a dime all of the time  
      ***A               B***  
Stays out at night moving through time  
      ***A               B***  
Oh, I want her, said I got to have her  
   ***E*** *(slide)*    ***C#m***  
The girl is all right, she's all right<!--n:Legs:s:0:e:2446-->
<!----><!--2020-09-06 04:09:06-->
LaGrange  
  
  *(Rhythm only)*  
  
  *Here is how I play the rhythm part of LaGrange. Our other guitarist does*  
  *the lead, so I've never bothered to learn it (and therefore haven't*  
  *included it :-)*  
  
  *Picking style is key to the percussive sound of this piece. Under*  
  *each section I have placed the following symbols:*  
  
  *^ indicates picking with an upward motion*  
  *v indicates picking with a downward motion*  
  
  *With a little practice, you can get a smooth up/down pattern esatblished,*  
  *and it stays the same throughout the song.*  
  *(clean sound)*  
  [----------------------|--------------------------------|  
  ----------------------|--------------------------------|  
  -------2--2--2--2--2--|.-2----2----2-4--2--2--2--2--2-.|  
  ----2--2--2--2--2--2--|.-2-2--2-4--2-2--2--2--2--2--2-.|  
  ----0-----------------|----0----0----------------------|  
  ----------------------|--------------------------------|]  
      *v  ^  ^  ^  ^  ^     ^ v  ^ v  ^ v  ^  ^  ^  ^  ^*  
  
  *During the first verse, keep repeating the section above between |: and :|*  
  *occasionally playing it this way to emphasize the words:*  
  
  [-----------------------------------  
  -----------------------------------  
  ---2----2----2----2--2--2--2--2----  
  ---2----2----2-2--2--2--2--2--2----  
  -----3----5----0-------------------  
  -----------------------------------]  
     *^ v  ^ v  ^ v  ^  ^  ^  ^  ^*  
  
  *Then after 'They got a lot o' nice girls' comes the break. Resume playing*  
  *the same as above with heavy distortion:*  
  
  [----------------------|--------------------------------|  
  ----------------------|--------------------------------|  
  -------2--2--2--2--2--|.-2----2----2----2--2--2--2--2-.|  
  ----2--2--2--2--2--2--|.-2----2----2-2--2--2--2--2--2-.|  
  ----0-----------------|----3----5----0-----------------|  
  ----------------------|--------------------------------|]  
      *v  ^  ^  ^  ^  ^     ^ v  ^ v  ^ v  ^  ^  ^  ^  ^*  
  
  *Keep repeating the part in between |: :| during the second verse, then*  
  *after 'I might be mistaken', switch to:*  
  
  [----------------------------|-------------------------------------------|  
  ----------------------------|-------------------------------------------|  
  ----------------------------|.-----8--8-10--10-------------------------.|  
  ----10-10--10--10--10--10---|.--10-8--8-10--10-10--10--10--10--10--10--.|  
  ----10-10--10--10--10--10---|---10-------------10--10--10--10--10--10---|  
  ----------------------------|-------------------------------------------|]  
      *v  ^   ^   ^   ^   ^        ^  v  ^ v   ^  v   ^   ^   ^   ^   ^*  
  
  *Then, during the guitar solo, keep playing the above section between |: :|*  
  *When the solo comes to an end, this is the pattern and the break:*  
  
  [------------------------------------------  
  ------------------------------------------  
  ---------------------------------8--8-10--  
  ----10-10--10--10--10--10-----10-8--8-10--  
  ----10-10--10--10--10--10-----10----------  
  ------------------------------------------]  
      *v  ^   ^   ^   ^   ^      ^  v  ^ v*  
  
  |-------5---5---5-----5---5---5-----5---5---5----------------|  
  |------------------------------------------------------------|  
  |.--------------------------------------------------------2-.|  
  |.--4/5---5---5---3/4---4---4---2/3---3---3---------------2-.|  
  |-----------------------------------------------0--0--3h4----|  
  |------------------------------------------------------------|  
  *(I usually play the D string with my pick and the E string with*  
     *my middle finger. You can, of course, play both with your pick)*  
  
  *Repeat the break between |: and :| twice, then go back to the*  
  *clean part (same as the very first section). Play it 4 times,*  
  *hit the distortion, and play the same as the first verse until the fade...*<!--n:LaGrange:s:2471:e:5024-->
<!----><!--2022-10-19 00:37:14-->
Intro: ***F5  Bb5  C5  x4***  
  
  ***F5          Bb5   C5***  
I got to have a shot  
  ***F5           Bb5   C5***  
Of what you got is oh so sweet  
  ***F5           Bb5  C5***  
You got to make it hot  
  ***F5          Bb5      C5***  
Like a boomerang I need a repeat  
  
  ***Bb5***  
Gimme all your lovin'  
  ***F5(v2)   F5  Bb5  C5***  
All your hugs and kissed too  
  ***Bb5***  
Gimme all your lovin'  
  ***F5(v2)   F5  Bb5  C5***  
Don't let up until we're through  
  
You got to whip it up  
And hit me like a ton of lead  
If I blow me top  
Will you let it go to your head?  
  
  ***Bb5***  
Gimme all your lovin'  
  ***F5(v2)   F5  Bb5  C5***  
All your hugs and kissed too  
  ***Bb5***  
Gimme all your lovin'  
  ***F5(v2)   F5  Bb5  C5***  
Don't let up until we're through  
  
Solo: ***C5  F5(v2)  G5  C5  F5(v2)  G5  C5  F5  Bb5  C5  F5  Bb5  C5***  
  
You got to move it up  
And use it like a screwball would  
You got to pack it up  
Work it like a new boy should  
  
Chorus:  
  
Outro: ***C5*** (to fade)<!--n:Gimme All Your Lovin':s:7527:e:1565-->
<!----><!--2022-11-19 18:45:23-->
Intro: ***A  F#m  Bm  E***  
  
    ***A***  
What in the world's come all over me?  
    ***F#m***  
I ain't got a chance of one in three.  
    ***Bm***  
Ain't got no rap, ain't got no line  
    ***E***  
but if you'll give me just a minute I'll be feelin' fine.  
  
    ***A***  
I am the one who can fade the heat,  
    ***F#m***  
the one they all say just can't be beat.  
    ***Bm***  
I'll shoot it to you straight and look you in the eye.  
    ***E***  
So gimme just a minute and I'll tell you why  
    ***A                F#m***  
I'm a rough boy, I'm a rough boy.  
  
  ***C#7 F#m Bm E***  
  
    ***A***  
I don't care how you look at me  
    ***F#m***  
because I'm the one and you will see  
    ***Bm***  
we can make it work, we can make it by.  
    ***E***  
So give me one more minute and I'll tell you why  
    ***A***  
I'm a rough boy, I'm a rough boy<!--n:Rough Boy:s:9137:e:1321-->
<!----><!--2022-10-14 00:17:06-->  
Clean shirt, new shoes  
and I don't know where I am goin' to.  
Silk suit, black tie,  
I don't need a reason why.  
They come runnin' just as fast as they can  
coz every girl crazy 'bout a sharp dressed man.  
  
Gold watch, diamond ring,  
I ain't missin' a single thing.  
And cufflinks, stick pin,  
when I step out I'm gonna do you in.  
They come runnin' just as fast as they can  
coz every girl crazy 'bout a sharp dressed man.  
  
Top coat, top hat,  
And I don't worry coz my wallet's fat.  
Black shades, white gloves,  
lookin' sharp and lookin' for love.  
They come runnin' just as fast as they can  
coz every girl grazy 'bout a sharp dressed man.<!--n:Sharp Dressed Man:s:10491:e:703-->
<!----><!--2025-12-21 22:12:35--><!--cover:-->Американское блюз-рок-трио из Хьюстона.
Легендарные техасские бородачи получили мировую известность в *1980*-х годах.<!--n:about:s:11235:e:7191-->
